allow: PowerShell(@\(3000, 3001\) | ForEach-Object { $port = $_; $pids = netstat -ano | Select-String ":$port\\s" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { if \($p -match '^\\d+$' -and $p -ne '0'\) { taskkill /PID $p /F 2>$null; Write-Host "Killed PID $p on port $port" } } })
